notes: No apparent issues whatsoever. Very stable, and viewport FPS was good. My test involved doing a render of Meet the Heavy, with AO and light sampling. Outputs worked fine and render went smoothly. It appears to work well
title: Source Filmmaker

notes: The program itself works great. Visually the program is doing what it's supposed to do. However movies that it renders are completely black with sound.
title: Source Filmmaker

notes:
Runs just like on Windows, seems to have native performance.
The framerate when moving the mouse on a 3d viewport drops enormously (this is not the case when moving the camera otherwise - and also doesn't happen on Windows).
Font is slightly hard to read.
Rendering movies works fine when using Image Sequence.
title: Source Filmmaker
